race.comment: EVELYN'S PHOENIX (9) returned from a break gaining a strong win by 0.5L over 1700m at Nottingham. Will be fitter for that outing. He is well-positioned to make it two from two this prep. HAPPY CHANDLER (12) resumed with a solid second tackling 1600m at Bath after racing prominently. Looks a major player in this. BEAUTY GENERATION (5) improved last time to finish third trying 1900m at Wolverhampton. Holds ability to be very competitive in this moderate looking affair. HE'S OUR CRACKER (1) won two runs ago at Chelmsford then was below his best when fifth attempting 1900m at Wolverhampton. Capable of a better showing here.
